title: Architect WorldCup Prediction C model output, the model-written subset
description: The forced structured-output contract bound to the Prediction C reconciliation call. The model fills only C's emitted 90-minute three-way, its emitted shootout lean, the citations for any material move off the A-B pool, and any justification. Code then computes the pool, the departures from the pool, the tolerance status, the shootout block, and the validation block, and assembles the full prediction_c document around this subset. Forced-output-friendly: additionalProperties false and enums only, no range or count constraints; the simplex and the cite-every-material-move rule are enforced in code. The tolerance box and the hard cap are never shown to the model, by construction.

citations.description: Each material move off the pool cites one of exactly three sources.

justification.description: Free text when C moves off the pool; null otherwise.
